name: Browser Link Crawler
description: Extract URLs using a headless browser (Playwright). Fallback for Cloudflare-protected or JS-heavy sites where HTTP-based crawlers fail. Crawls homepage + key internal pages.
usage_notes: Expensive fallback for Cloudflare-protected or JS-heavy sites where HTTP-based crawlers return 403 or empty results. Falls back to Wayback Machine if browser also fails. Only run on entities that returned 0 URLs from cheaper crawlers.

options.name: max_urls
options.label: Maximum URLs per site
options.description: Limit how many URLs to extract per entity.

options.name: max_depth_pages
options.label: Internal pages to crawl
options.description: How many key internal pages (blog, news, about, etc.) to follow from the homepage for deeper link discovery.

options.name: request_timeout
options.label: Page timeout (ms)
options.description: Timeout per page fetch in milliseconds. Increase for very slow sites.

options.name: same_domain_only
options.label: Same domain only
options.description: Only include links pointing to the same domain as the homepage.

options.name: concurrency
options.label: Concurrent page fetches
options.description: How many internal pages to fetch in parallel. Higher = faster but more resource-heavy.

options.name: load_more_selector
options.label: Load More button selector
options.description: CSS selector for a 'Load More' or 'See More' button. If set, the crawler clicks this button repeatedly to reveal all content before extracting links. Leave empty for pages without pagination.

options.name: max_load_more_clicks
options.label: Max Load More clicks
options.description: Maximum number of times to click the Load More button. The crawler stops early if the button disappears, becomes disabled, or produces no new content.

options.name: max_load_more_seconds
options.label: Load More time budget (seconds)
options.description: Wall-time budget for the Load More click loop. The crawler stops clicking when this budget is exceeded, even if max clicks hasn't been reached.

output_schema.found_on: string (URL of the page where this link was found)
